name: anthropic-api-cascaded-context-recovery
description: Anthropic API agentic streaming loop: how to recover from context-size errors (prompt-too-long 413, max-output-tokens) without terminating the session. TRIGGER when: designing or implementing any agentic loop that streams from the Anthropic API, when debugging sessions that terminate unexpectedly on context overflow, when deciding how to wire post-turn hooks, or when a team member asks why errors are withheld from the stream rather than surfaced immediately.
author: Anthropic
